subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Bear witness in thy soul, then in thy spirit, then in thine essence, that the Tree of Sinai is upon this Branch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین ان اشهد فی نفسک ثم فی روحک ثم فی ذاتک بان شجره الطور علی غصن هذا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @love of God, @call to action
